clues: A user trying to open a departmental shared folder receives an access denied error.
The user could access this folder yesterday but can no longer reach it today.
Other users in the same department can access the folder without any problems.
The user confirms they have not changed their password or been reassigned to a different team.
The user's Active Directory group membership changed due to an automated HR system update.
